phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la oficina de información turística?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah oh-fee-SEE-nah deh een-fohr-mah-SYOHN too-REE-stee-kah?

likely_response.local: En la terminal T1, planta baja, derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tehr-mee-NAHL T PLAHN-tah BAH-hah deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: In terminal T1, ground floor, right.

responses.english: In terminal T1, ground floor, right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tehr-mee-NAHL T PLAHN-tah BAH-hah deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: En la terminal T1, planta baja, derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the official taxi stand is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde se encuentra la parada oficial de taxis?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-trah lah pah-RAH-dah oh-fee-SYAL deh TAHK-sees?

likely_response.local: Salga por la puerta T1-A, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAHL-gah POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah T AH AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow green signs towards the outside exit.

responses.english: Follow green signs towards the outside exit.
responses.phonetic: SAHL-gah POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah T AH AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.local: Salga por la puerta T1-A, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where luggage storage is located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la consigna de equipajes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah kohn-SEE-nyah deh eh-kee-PAH-hes?

likely_response.local: En la terminal T2, nivel de llegadas.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tehr-mee-NAHL T nee-BEHL DEH yeh-GAH-dahs

responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tehr-mee-NAHL T nee-BEHL DEH yeh-GAH-dahs
responses.local: En la terminal T2, nivel de llegadas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where car rental pickup area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la recogida de coches de alquiler?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah reh-koh-HEE-dah deh KOH-chehs deh ahl-kee-LEHR?

likely_response.translation_en: At the rental module, follow the signs.

responses.english: At the rental module, follow the signs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Aerobus tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro los billetes del Aerobús?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh KOHM-proh lohs bee-YEH-tehs del ah-eh-roh-BOOS?

likely_response.local: En las máquinas fuera de la terminal.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAHS MÁK-ee-nahs foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL
likely_response.translation_en: At the machines outside the terminal.

responses.english: At the machines outside the terminal.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAHS MÁK-ee-nahs foo-EH-rah DEH LAH tehr-mee-NAHL
responses.local: En las máquinas fuera de la terminal.
